proposal1.heroHeadline: Kids Industries is losing 1,200 hours annually on manual proposals. Here is exactly why.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, creating a tailored proposal is a manual slog for your team. With our system, it's done in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Here are the ongoing losses Kids Industries faces with every proposal.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Every hour spent on proposals is an hour not spent on crafting strategies for family brands. Your team loses 100 hours monthly.

problems.title: Human Error Costs
problems.description: Manual entries lead to errors. Each mistake may cost a potential deal or damage your brand's reputation. You risk losing $5,000 per error.

problems.title: Slow Response Times
problems.description: Clients expect quick turnaround. Delays cause frustration and lost opportunities. You risk losing deals worth up to $50,000 annually.

problems.title: High Personnel Costs
problems.description: Skilled workers spending time on clerical tasks is inefficient. Each misplaced hour costs you $75, adding up to $90,000 a year.

problems.title: Lost Competitive Edge
problems.description: Struggling to keep up with faster competitors can cost market share. This results in potential losses of up to $25,000 annually.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistencies
problems.description: Inconsistent branding in proposals weakens your market position. Each inconsistency could cost a deal valued at $10,000.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system is the solution to all the above challenges.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours. Our system delivers them in under 60 seconds, freeing up your team.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual entries lead to costly mistakes. Our AI ensures accuracy every time, preserving your reputation.

solutions.title: Rapid Client Response
solutions.description: Your team struggles to keep up with demand. Our system sends proposals instantly, keeping clients engaged.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: High personnel costs on non-core tasks drain resources. Our AI reduces these costs significantly by automating the process.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Brand inconsistencies weaken your impact. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with your brand standards.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Kids Industries's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Kids Industries around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Kids Industries.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock the Power of Family Connections with Kids Industries.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Let's revitalize Acme Corp's brand by connecting with families in deeper ways. We'll use our expertise in research and creative strategy.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every missed connection with families is a lost opportunity for Acme Corp.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor leaving without buying is revenue walking out the door. Acme Corp loses potential sales and brand loyalty daily.

problems.title: Weak Family Engagement
problems.description: Without strong family connections, Acme Corp misses out on a loyal customer base. This results in declining repeat purchases.

problems.title: Outdated Brand Perception
problems.description: An outdated brand image can alienate modern families. It leads to decreased market relevance and sales.

problems.title: Limited Market Insights
problems.description: Lack of market intelligence means Acme Corp can't anticipate trends. This results in missed opportunities and revenue loss.

problems.title: Ineffective Campaigns
problems.description: Without targeted campaigns, Acme Corp wastes marketing spend. This leads to poor ROI and stagnant growth.

problems.title: Subpar User Experience
problems.description: A cumbersome user experience drives customers away. Acme Corp loses potential long-term clients and revenue.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Each solution directly addresses the losses Acme Corp is facing.

solutions.title: Family Market Research
solutions.description: We provide deep insights into family behaviors. This helps Acme Corp tailor products and marketing strategies effectively.

solutions.title: Creative Strategy
solutions.description: We develop engaging content that resonates with families. This improves brand perception and customer loyalty.

solutions.title: Digital Transformation
solutions.description: We enhance user experiences to drive conversions. This reduces bounce rates and increases sales.

solutions.title: Strategic Campaign Planning
solutions.description: We create targeted campaigns to maximize reach and ROI. This ensures Acme Corp's marketing dollars are well spent.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Here's why Kids Industries is the right partner for Acme Corp.

whyUsCards.title: Award-Winning Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our track record in the family market speaks for itself. We know what works.

whyUsCards.title: Family Focused
whyUsCards.description: We specialize in connecting brands with families. It's our core expertise.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Strategies
whyUsCards.description: Our research-driven approach ensures all strategies are backed by solid data.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with your team to ensure seamless integration and success.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to making Acme Corp thrive.

team.name: Gary Pope
team.bio: Gary has led strategy and client relationships for over two decades. His expertise ensures every project is a success.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We dive deep into understanding your brand and market.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: We create a tailored strategy for Acme Corp's unique needs.

process.title: Creative Execution
process.description: Our team rolls out the creative elements, ensuring alignment with strategy.

process.description: We assess performance and make necessary adjustments.

pricing.description: For brands beginning their journey into family markets.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's have a chat about how we can elevate your brand.

lead.company_description:
We make family targeted brands stronger by delivering award winning insight, strategy and content. We work across multiple disciplines and in multiple industries. We've got researchers, marketers, designers, strategists, geeks and psychologists. We've built new websites, award winning hotels for the family, developed new TV stations, created new cereals, launched new products and researched just about everything under the sun.

Unique? We think so. There is no other company in the world that offers our level of family understanding coupled with the ability to turn this into effective strategy and implementation.

We'd love to hear from you at hello@kidsindustries.com or give us a ring on 0203 432 8574
lead.headline: Co-founder, Kids Industries | License Global's Influencer Of 2022 | Children's Ambassador Poc | Family Market Expert | Everything I Post Is By Me. Always.
